since_last: 58% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +4.56%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.21% · BTC +2.41% · Gold +1.10% · Nasdaq100 -1.50%. 58% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +4.56%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +4.56%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.78%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -11.97%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.05%, APP +9.42%, META +8.82%, PLTR +7.77%, SNAP +7.55%. Laggards: KLAC -11.97%, TER -11.76%, MU -9.98%, AMAT -9.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.95% at $157.27
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.95% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
